message:
test: add worker channel status race regression, expand WASM ABI matrix and stub audit probes

Three test-layer additions:

worker_channel_race_test.rs (new):
  Regression test for stale WorkerOp::StatusSnapshot messages arriving
  after a job has entered CancelRequested state. The coordinator must
  silently ignore the outdated Running snapshot rather than reverting
  the job's cancel intent. Without this guard, a slow worker that
  reports "still running" after cancellation was requested could leave
  the coordinator in an inconsistent state.

wasm_packaged_abi_compatibility_matrix.rs:
  Extended to cover the single-owner canonical-vs-retained Browser
  Edition boundary policy (asupersync-v2ofj7.2). New tests verify:
  - retained WASM manifest declares non-canonical scaffold policy
  - browser boundary crates agree on single canonical owner
  - stub closure policy document maintains ordered section structure
  - changelog and migration guide reference retained-package policy
  Utility helper assert_markers_in_order added for ordered-marker checks.

stub_resolution_audit.rs:
  Probe 11 (API skeleton relocated) strengthened: now additionally
  verifies that README.md links to the new docs/design/ location
  rather than the removed root path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
